files.pattern: Core framework — defines Tool.Def, Tool.define(), Tool.init(), Context, ExecuteResult, InvalidArgumentsError, Info, cacheable support
files.summary: Core tool infrastructure: Def interface, define()/init() factories, Context type, ExecuteResult, cache integration, InvalidArgumentsError

files.pattern: Schema definition — exports ToolID branded schema with Identifier-based ascending IDs
files.summary: ToolID branded schema for tool output truncation IDs

files.summary: Tool output cache service with Deferred-based concurrent request deduplication

files.summary: Checkpoint record creation and formatting helpers (shared by checkpoint/publish_checkpoint tools)

files.summary: Phase event publishing helpers: publishStarted, publishCompleted, publishFailed

files.summary: Workspace boundary validation utilities for external directory access

files.summary: Failure record collection and formatting helpers (used by checkpoint tools)

files.summary: Semaphore-based file locking for concurrent edit safety

files.summary: Effect Schema to JSON Schema converter with reference inlining and normalization

files.summary: Shell tool prompt rendering with platform-specific command guidance sections

files.summary: Tool registry service — lazy-initializes all 58 tools, manages plugin tool conversion, builds tool layers
